summary: Completed full testing of AI Trading Bot API and frontend. Fixed 1 bug in news_service.py. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend renders correctly with all components working.

fixed.issue: Database truth value testing error - 'if self.db:' throws error with Motor AsyncIOMotorDatabase objects
fixed.fix: Changed to 'if self.db is not None:' in news_service.py line 16

critical_code_review_comments: News service uses demo mode since no real API keys configured (expected behavior)
Market indices are randomly generated (mocked - expected for paper trading)
Trading engine is paper trading simulation (mocked - expected)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all components render, all tabs work, settings modal works)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo news data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs tested and working. Frontend refactored into 7 components (MarketTicker, RiskPanel, NewsFeed, TradesList, SignalsList, AutoTradingSettings, PositionCalculator, SettingsPanel). Settings panel has 4 tabs (Broker/Risk/Schedule/Advanced). News is in demo mode since no real API keys. MOCKED: News articles (demo), Trading engine (paper), Market indices (random).

tested_features.backend_health: PASS - /api/health returns healthy status with all services active
tested_features.settings_get: PASS - /api/settings returns news settings with sources, newsapi_key, alphavantage_key
tested_features.news_fetch: PASS - /api/news/fetch works in demo mode, returns 5 demo articles with sentiment
tested_features.news_latest: PASS - /api/news/latest returns stored news from MongoDB
tested_features.portfolio: PASS - /api/portfolio returns portfolio data (current_value, pnl, trades, etc)
tested_features.stats: PASS - /api/stats returns statistics (news_analyzed, signals, trades, win_rate)
tested_features.settings_update: PASS - POST /api/settings/update correctly updates news source settings
tested_features.frontend_dashboard: PASS - All sections visible (Market Ticker, Risk Panel, Portfolio Cards, Tabs)
tested_features.news_feed_tab: PASS - Shows articles with sentiment badges (BULLISH/BEARISH)
tested_features.auto_trading_settings: PASS - Collapsible panel with Auto-Exit and Auto-Entry toggles
tested_features.all_components: PASS - MarketTicker, RiskPanel, NewsFeed, TradesList, SignalsList, AutoTradingSettings, PositionCalculator render without errors
